name: Path Equivalence: 'filedir\' (Trailing Backslash)
description: The product does not properly handle paths with trailing backslashes, which Windows may strip or interpret as directory indicators, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls by appending a backslash to restricted filenames.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with a trailing backslash that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check treats 'filename\' differently from 'filename' while Windows resolves them equivalently at STORAGE[file_access]
